aui.name: Example Shop
aui.description: An online store for electronics and accessories. Use these tasks to help users search for products, apply filters, share items, and configure wishlists.

task.name: Search Products
task.description: Search the product catalog. Use this when a user wants to find, browse, or discover products. The URL opens the search results page with filters pre-applied. On iOS and Android, this opens the native app search experience.

param.name: q
param.description: The search query. Should reflect the user's intent in natural product-search terms (e.g., 'wireless earbuds noise cancelling').

param.name: category
param.description: Filter results to a specific product category.

options.option: Phones, tablets, laptops, and other devices.
Smartwatches, fitness trackers, and AR glasses.
Smart home devices, appliances, and IoT.

param.name: price_min
param.description: Minimum price in USD. Use when the user specifies a budget floor.

param.name: price_max
param.description: Maximum price in USD. Use when the user specifies a budget ceiling.

options.option: Cheapest first. Use when user wants deals or is budget-conscious.
Most expensive first. Use when user wants premium options.
Highest rated first. Use when user wants the best-reviewed items.
Most recently added. Use when user wants the latest products.

param.name: in_stock
param.description: Only show items currently in stock. Set to true unless the user explicitly wants to see out-of-stock items.

example.intent: Find me some good noise cancelling headphones under $200
What's new in smart home devices?

task.name: Share Product
task.description: Generate a shareable link to a specific product. Use this when a user wants to send a product to someone or save it for later. The link opens the product detail page.

param.name: sku
param.description: The product SKU. This must be a known product identifier. If the agent doesn't have the SKU, use the product-search task first.

param.name: ref
param.description: Attribution source. Set to 'agent' to indicate the link was constructed by an AI agent.

example.intent: Send me a link to the Sony WH-1000XM5

task.name: Configure Wishlist View
task.description: Open the user's wishlist with specific display settings. Use this when a user wants to review their saved items in a particular order or filtered view.
